## Where Things Stand

### Project Alpha
Brief paragraph describing the current state — what's been built, what milestone was just hit, what the focus is right now. Mention key technical details (e.g. "backend scaffolded with FastAPI, frontend React/Vite"). Reference recent demos or deliverables. Call out the go-to-market angle or strategic framing if relevant.

### Project Beta
Same format — current state in plain language. Include what's operational vs planned. Reference key artifacts (e.g. "guidelines moved from Notion to vault as canonical source"). Note tooling status (e.g. "tooling evaluation assigned but not started").

### Project Gamma
Even small or personal projects get a paragraph. Deployed where, what it does, what's new.

## Team Participation

**@Alice** is active across Project Alpha and Project Beta — 12 commits this week, plugin activity logged daily.

**@Bob** has profiles set up but zero commits and zero plugin activity.

**Priority**: Get the team onboarded — the infrastructure is ready, security checklists are waiting for completion.

## Active Projects

```dataview
TABLE Status, Lead, Created
FROM "projects"
WHERE file.name = "status" AND Status != null
SORT Created DESC
```

## All Active Tasks (by priority)

```dataview
TASK FROM "team"
WHERE !completed
SORT priority ASC
LIMIT 30
```

## Blockers

```dataview
TASK FROM "team"
WHERE !completed AND contains(text, "#blocker")
```

## Upcoming Deadlines (Next 7 Days)

```dataview
TASK FROM "team"
WHERE !completed AND due != null AND due <= date(today) + dur(7 days)
SORT due ASC
```
